ab: harem kana wari i kungkuwan mu maw na ma’ari’ari marepakuwakuwa na wari. sazu na pa’ari’ariyan na parepakuwakuwayan.
ch: 今天是學校的運動會，學校舉辦了許多競賽。
en: Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

ab: ulra na makakezeng kana lralrakitr, temapi’i kana mali, na pavavekas, maw na malikakasaw, na penapana’.
ch: 有拔河、足球、跑步、跳舞和射箭。
en: There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.

ab: inku mu kuwarelrang ku kana pavavekas na pa’ari’ariyan.
en: I participated in the running competition.

ab: a pavavekas ku mu kutapelra’ ku zi mudara’ kemalrawalrawa ku vulan.
ch: 當我跑步的時候，我跌倒了，膝蓋流了很多血。
en: When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.

ab: maw mu marahan ku zi pavekas ku parekipiya.
ch: 但我站起來，繼續向前跑。
en: But I stood up and continued running forward.

ab: medek ku kana raredekan salaw semangal na trau papiya kaninku.
ch: 我到終點時所有人都很開心。
en: Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

ab: kara ’azi ku melak za sanga mu maw mu semangal ku, kana parekipiya ku kanini na pa’ari’ariyan.
ch: 雖然沒有獲得第一名，但我很高興，因為我完成了比賽。
en: Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.
